title: Yang Patah Tumbuh, Yang Hilang Berganti
original_title: Yang Patah Tumbuh, Yang Hilang Berganti
overview: Yasmin's happiness in managing a small inn in Solo with Darto disappeared after the arrival of Hardiman, Yasmin's father, who was a former legendary dancer.
